thesis: India defence + clean-energy localisation drives a multi-year order book; strong, rising analyst revisions corroborate peer-beating momentum.
falsification: Order-book/execution disappoints or revisions roll over; a momentum break with falling revisions means the structural story has stalled.

thesis: India's power-transmission build-out is a structural multi-year capex cycle; GE Vernova T&D is a direct beneficiary with rising revisions.
falsification: Transmission ordering slows or revisions turn down while the stock stays extended.

thesis: Electrification and grid-modernisation capex underpins durable demand; momentum confirms the trend.
falsification: Margin/order weakness or a clear momentum reversal with deteriorating revisions.

thesis: Power-gen equipment demand from the broader energy capex cycle; momentum leads peers.
falsification: Momentum fades and revisions soften, signalling the capex order flow has peaked.

thesis: Energy-transition and grid capex; rising revisions support a structural entry even with muted current momentum.
falsification: Revisions stop rising or order intake disappoints.

thesis: Defence explosives and infra demand drive durable growth; revisions are strongly positive.
falsification: Revisions roll over or defence/export order momentum stalls.

thesis: Transformers/industrial electrification demand; constructive revisions and a strong franchise.
falsification: Revisions deteriorate or order growth slows materially.

thesis: Data-centre and 5G fibre demand plus a balance-sheet turnaround; very strong revisions and momentum.
falsification: Momentum breaks down or the de-leveraging story slips; an 8-sigma momentum name can reverse hard.

thesis: Optical-fibre and defence-electronics order flow; strong momentum.
falsification: Order momentum stalls or the stock's strong trend breaks.

thesis: Firm aluminium prices and cost position; rising revisions confirm the upgrade cycle.
falsification: Aluminium price/revision rollover — a cyclical bet, exited if revisions fade even if it looks cheap.

thesis: Steel-chain demand and pricing support earnings upgrades; strong revisions.
falsification: Iron-ore/revision rollover.

thesis: Base/precious-metal exposure with rising revisions; a cleaner way to own the silver tailwind than a passive ETF.
falsification: Metal prices fall and revisions reverse.

thesis: Diversified metals + the demerger value-unlock; constructive revisions and reasonable valuation.
falsification: Commodity downcycle or demerger value-unlock disappoints; revisions turn down.

thesis: Downstream aluminium + Novelis spreads; rising revisions.
falsification: Novelis spreads compress or aluminium revisions reverse.

thesis: Cement/chemicals cycle plus paints ramp; strong rising revisions.
falsification: Paints losses widen or core revisions roll over.

thesis: Sterile-injectables recovery and US base-business normalisation; strong revisions.
falsification: US pricing/volume disappoints or revisions fade.

thesis: US specialty pipeline + steady India business; rising revisions.
falsification: US pipeline slips or revisions turn down.

thesis: VNB margin/par-shift improvement with deep value and strongly rising revisions.
falsification: Margin/embedded-value progress stalls or revisions reverse.

thesis: High gold prices lift gold-loan AUM and yields; strong revisions.
falsification: Gold price reversal or regulatory tightening; revisions roll over.

thesis: Pricing-led volume recovery in staples; rising revisions.
falsification: Volume/margin disappointment or revisions fade.

thesis: Steady loan growth, strong asset quality, best return-ratios among large banks.
falsification: Asset-quality deterioration or a clear earnings-revision downgrade cycle.

thesis: Re-rating on improving deposits/asset quality.
falsification: Deposit-cost or asset-quality stress; revisions turn down.

thesis: Deep value with system credit growth, but revision momentum is soft.
falsification: Asset-quality slippage or further revision downgrades.

thesis: Long-run consumer-credit compounding; near-term revisions muted.
falsification: Credit-cost spike or sustained revision downgrades.

thesis: Eyewear retail formalisation; strong rising revisions.
falsification: Growth/margin disappointment in a richly priced name; revisions roll over.

thesis: Value-commerce scale economics; cheap relative to peers.
falsification: Take-rate/path-to-profit disappoints; competitive intensity rises.

thesis: Zudio/Westside store economics and SSSG; long runway.
falsification: SSSG slowdown or margin compression; revisions turn down.

thesis: Formalisation of jewellery and rising discretionary spend.
falsification: Studded-mix/margin pressure or demand slowdown.

thesis: ARPU uplift and India wireless consolidation; FCF inflection.
falsification: Tariff/competition shock or revisions reverse.

thesis: EV mix and exports drive premiumisation.
falsification: Volume/EV-margin disappointment; revisions roll over.

thesis: SUV market-share gains + tractor up-cycle.
falsification: SUV demand cools or revision downgrades set in.

thesis: Large-deal ramp drives an earnings-upgrade cycle; revisions are strongly positive.
falsification: Deal ramp slips or discretionary IT spend weakens; revisions reverse.

thesis: License + cloud transition lifts margins; rising revisions.
falsification: License lumpiness or revision downgrades.

thesis: Steady large-cap IT compounding once discretionary spend recovers.
falsification: Further guidance cuts or revision downgrades.

thesis: Indigenisation order pipeline; durable defence capex.
falsification: Order-inflow slowdown or margin pressure; revisions roll over.

thesis: Multi-year aircraft/engine order book.
falsification: Execution delays or revision downgrades.

thesis: Wires/cables demand from housing + infra + power capex.
falsification: Margin/competition pressure from new entrants; revisions fade.

thesis: Wires/cables consumption growth; rising revisions.
falsification: Pricing competition compresses margins; revisions reverse.

thesis: Fluorine/agro-spec capex with long contracts.
falsification: Order delays or revision downgrades.

thesis: Content-per-vehicle gains + acquisitions; constructive revisions.
falsification: Global auto-production weakness; revisions roll over.

thesis: CV/export recovery plus defence ramp; rising revisions.
falsification: CV/export cycle turns or revisions reverse.

thesis: CDMO ramp + ARV recovery; rising revisions.
falsification: CDMO order delays or revision downgrades.

thesis: Hospital occupancy + 24/7 digital scale.
falsification: Margin pressure from digital losses; revisions fade.

thesis: PepsiCo distribution expansion (India + Africa).
falsification: Volume/season disappointment; revisions roll over.

thesis: Tea/salt pricing + growth-portfolio scale-up.
falsification: Commodity-cost squeeze or growth-brand losses.

thesis: Franchise scale-up to universal bank; rising revisions.
falsification: Asset-quality stress or NIM compression.

thesis: Stabilising asset quality drives an earnings-upgrade cycle; rising revisions.
falsification: Fresh asset-quality or governance shocks; revisions reverse.

thesis: Retail demat + activity growth; rising revisions.
falsification: Regulatory F&O tightening or volume slump.

thesis: Derivatives volume share gains lift transaction revenue; rising revisions.
falsification: Regulatory cap on derivatives volumes; revisions reverse.

thesis: Online insurance distribution scale + path to profit.
falsification: Growth deceleration or revision downgrades.

thesis: Stable thermal-coal demand + dividend yield; rising revisions.
falsification: Volume/price weakness or revisions reverse.

thesis: Upstream cash flows with the cheapest valuation in the set and strong revisions.
falsification: Crude collapse or windfall-levy/subsidy shock; revisions reverse.

thesis: Consumer + new-energy optionality; large-cap ballast.
falsification: Retail/telecom monetisation stalls; revisions stay negative.

thesis: Volume growth from capacity ramp at improving margins.
falsification: Steel-price downcycle or expansion delays.
